Name: CAMERA_MENU_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera in menu.

Fields.Name: Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: The behavior to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Camera Reference Point Type
Fields.Description: The reference point to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Field of View
Fields.Description: The field of view (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Collision Size
Fields.Description: The collision size of the camera.

Fields.Name: Fulcrum Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The fulcrum offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Fulcrum Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The fulcrum offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Fulcrum Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The fulcrum offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed Increase Time
Fields.Description: The increase time (in seconds) for fast turn speed rate.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the x-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Fast Turn Speed: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the fast turn on the y-axis.

Fields.Name: Direct Pitch Angle
Fields.Description: The direct pitching angle of the camera (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Direct Pitch %
Fields.Description: The direct pitching rate of the camera.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Y-Axis Rotation - Addition
Fields.Description: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) added during wall avoidance for this camera.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Y-Axis Rotation - Maximum
Fields.Description: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) maximum used during wall avoidance for this camera.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Rotation Decay %
Fields.Description: The rotation decay rate of rotation adjustments during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Angle
Fields.Description: The wing angle (in degrees) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Length
Fields.Description: The wing length (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Radius
Fields.Description: The wing radius (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Wall Avoidance: Wing Spacing
Fields.Description: The wing spacing (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

Fields.Name: Minimum Reset Time
Fields.Description: The minimum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

Fields.Name: Maximum Reset Time
Fields.Description: The maximum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

Fields.Name: Reset Speed Change %
Fields.Description: The camera reset speed change rate for this camera.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.
